chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.347 of 2023 MCB Bank Limited Versus Zahid Ali and others DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). For Direction For orders on office objection No.1 as flagged “A” regarding maintainability of the High Court Appeal (if office objection is overruled or deferred then fix for other purpose).-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 22.11.2023 Mr. Shoukat Ali Chaudhry, Advocate for the appellant..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Learned counsel for the appellant submits that the impugned order in these proceedings is arising out of an order passed by the learned Judge in appellate jurisdiction i.e constitutional jurisdiction out of which this appeal has been filed under Law Reforms Ordinance, 1972. We have decided this question separately in some identical matters such as High Court Appeal No.372 of 2023 [M/s National Oil Refinery Ltd. v. Syed Mansoor Ali and others], which principle would apply in these proceedings directly, hence the instant High Court Appeal is being dismissed on the same grounds and reasoning by applying the principle mutatis mutandis. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
